title: Mr Sandwiches' New Ores
description: This mod adds 3 awesome new ores to discover!
body:
This mod adds 3 exciting new ores to discover!
- Adamantite:
This ore spawns rarely below y level -30. You can get Raw adamantite by mining it with a diamond pickaxe. This raw adamantite can be smelted into an adamantite ingot that can be used to craft Adamantite tools and armor that have 2700 durability!
- Astrite
By mining this ore found in the nether with a diamond pickaxe, you get astrite buds. By smelting a block of Astrite, you get compacted Astrite. Useful to craft the Astrite upgrade smithing template to make diamond equipment into Astrite.
- Nether Jade
This ore is useful only because it gives a lot of XP. Like its name suggests, this ore is found in the nether. It requires an iron pickaxe to be mined and the ore is found anywhere with netherrack.
- Endermen drop ores now. They can drop: Nothing, Ender Pearls, Astrite buds, Adamantite/Gold/Iron ingots, Diamonds, Emeralds and Lapis Lazuli.
